title: Improper WIDTH warning on a parameterized module

features.name: parameter width expression using another parameter
features.description: Code should include a module parameter declared with width expression that depends on another parameter, like parameter [W-1:0] INIT={W{1'b0}};

features.name: parameterized module instantiation passing parameter through
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module that instantiates another parameterized module passing its own parameter W, like paramtest_DFFRE#(W) dffre0(clk,1'b0,cke,d,q);

features.name: non-blocking assignment using parameter in procedural timing control
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a register using a parameter variable in an if statement under procedural timing control (always @(posedge clk or posedge rst))
